creator: jimmiejaz@gmail.com
text:
Sorry for the delay in responding.

Yup, that seems to have been the cause. Removing spidermonkey allowed 
deskutils/lightning-thunderbird to build and install without a hitch.

Maybe there should be a note in the Makefile or pkg-descr about this, as 
it's not obvious.

Please close this PR as it's been resolved for me, unless others are 
hitting it as well.
